title: Gregory Jewellers
description: Gregory Jewellers Pty Ltd is an Australian-owned, family-operated fine jewellery retailer with more than 45 years of heritage in craftsmanship and customer service. The company specializes in a diverse portfolio of fine jewellery, watches, and accessories, each piece crafted with meticulous attention to detail in state-of-the-art production facilities located in Sydney's CBD. Gregory Jewellers maintains rigorous quality standards through its proprietary five-point criteria process, known as The Gregory Standard, which ensures every piece bearing the Gregory maker's mark meets the finest degree of quality. The company's commitment to excellence extends to its diamond selection, with all diamonds sourced and hand-selected to exceed industry standards.
